title: Schema Registry & Kafka Connect
learningObjectives: Explain **Schema Registry** roles, **subject** strategies, and **compatibility** modes
Operate **Kafka Connect** with tasks, converters, transforms, and DLQ discipline
Prevent **breaking** schema changes using **CI** and governance processes
Design **idempotent** sinks and **keying** strategies for **at-least-once** delivery
Secure registry and connector credentials with rotation and least privilege

sections.title: Why Schema Registry & Kafka Connect matters
sections.content:
**Schema Registry** and **Connect** operationalize **contracts** at **scale**. Strong candidates articulate **compatibility** modes, **connector** failure surfaces, and **DLQ** hygiene—not just buzzwords.

Financial and compliance orgs care about **PII** in schemas and **sink** idempotency.

sections.title: Theory and Internals - Schema Registry & Kafka Connect
sections.content:
### Day 64 — **Schema** **Registry** + **Kafka** **Connect**

### 1. Registry purpose
Versioned **schemas** + **REST** + **compatibility** policies.

### 2. Compatibility
**Backward**, **forward**, **full**, **transitive** nuances.

### 3. Connect
Source/sink **tasks**, **converters**, **transforms**.

### 4. Failure handling
**errors.tolerance**, **DLQ** topics, **restarts**.

### 5. Data quality
**CI** checks for **breaking** changes.

### 6. Story
**Auto-register** in prod causes incompatible **Avro** → CI gate + **rollback**.

sections.title: Basic — Registry + Connect vocabulary
sections.output:
registry: central schema versions + compatibility rules
connect: source/sink integration framework
subject: named schema lineage used by serdes

sections.title: Intermediate — Compatibility mode labels
sections.output:
backward: new schema reads old data
forward: old schema reads new data

sections.title: Advanced — Subject name builder toy
Connect sink with converters
sections.description: Tasks read Kafka, write to DB with schema-aware deserialization.
sections.plantuml:
@startuml
title Day 64 — Connect sink
queue Kafka
participant ConnectorTask
database Database
Kafka -> ConnectorTask : poll records
ConnectorTask -> Database : upsert with pk.mode
@enduml

sections.title: Exercise — Schema Registry & Connect — task restart causes (Day 64 assignment)
sections.problem: Print **exactly**: DB auth failure, schema mismatch, or deserialization error

sections.title: Interview Drill

conceptual.question: What is **Schema Registry**?
conceptual.answer: Central **schema** **store** with **compatibility** rules and **REST** access for **producer**/**consumer** serdes. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**.

followUps.question: Production follow-up: which **dashboards** or **metrics** expose this for **Schema Registry and Kafka Connect**?
followUps.answer: Start with **client** **outbound** **histograms** and **resilience4j** **circuitbreaker** **state** **gauges**, then open **distributed** **traces** filtered by **service** **name** and **route**. Central **schema** **store** with **compatibility** rules and **REST** access for **producer**/**con For **gateway** and **service** stacks, emphasize **timeout** ordering (**outer > inner**), **bulkheads** per **tenant**, and **JWT** **cache** **TTL** during **issuer** rotations. Communicate **executive**-friendly **impact**: **customer** **minutes** degraded, **error** **budget** burn, **mitigation** **ETA**, and **post-incident** **themes** mapped to **roadmap** work.

followUps.question: How do you **roll out** a policy change here without a **retry** **storm**?
followUps.answer: Use **feature** **flags**, **canary** **deployments**, **tight** **retry** **budgets** on **non-idempotent** calls, and **verify** with **load** tests that **match** **production** **fan-out**. Central **schema** **store** with **compatibility** rules and **REST** access for **produc Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**.

conceptual.question: **BACKWARD** compatibility meaning?
conceptual.answer: New **schema** can read **data** written with **previous** schema (common default). Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings. Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**.

followUps.question: Production follow-up: which **dashboards** or **metrics** expose this for **Schema Registry and Kafka Connect**?
followUps.answer: Start with **client** **outbound** **histograms** and **resilience4j** **circuitbreaker** **state** **gauges**, then open **distributed** **traces** filtered by **service** **name** and **route**. New **schema** can read **data** written with **previous** schema (common default). Call out **ownership**: **platform** **SRE** for **mesh**/**certs**, **service** teams for **timeout** policy, **SRE** for **SLO** **burn** **alerts**—and how those teams **coordinate** during **sev-1** calls. Interviewers reward naming **metrics** (`http_client_requests_seconds`, `resilience4j_circuitbreaker_state`), **trace** correlation IDs, and **rollback** criteria rather than hand-wavy resilience claims.

conceptual.answer: **Forward** allows old code to read new data; **full** is intersection of **forward** + **backward**. conceptual.question: **DLQ** in Connect?
conceptual.answer: Route **failed** records to a **dead-letter** topic with **error** metadata. Tie answers to **Spring** reality: **Feign** + **LoadBalancer**, **WebClient** + **`ExchangeFilterFunction`**, **Resilience4j** registries, and **Micrometer** tags that make **on-call** searches fast. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail.

seniorScenario.question: **Design:** **Share** one **subject** for unrelated events.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Modeling review.

**(2) Root cause** Couples evolution unnecessarily.

**(3) Fix** Split subjects per type.

**(4) Prevention** ADR. Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings. Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**. Call out **ownership**: **platform** **SRE** for **mesh**/**certs**, **service** teams for **timeout** policy, **SRE** for **SLO** **burn** **alerts**—and how those teams **coordinate** during **sev-1** calls. Interviewers reward naming **metrics** (`http_client_requests_seconds`, `resilience4j_circuitbreaker_state`), **trace** correlation IDs, and **rollback** criteria rather than hand-wavy resilience claims. Tie answers to **Spring** reality: **Feign** + **LoadBalancer**, **WebClient** + **`ExchangeFilterFunction`**, **Resilience4j** registries, and **Micrometer** tags that make **on-call** searches fast.

seniorScenario.question: **Cost:** **Registry** HA cluster oversized.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Right-size.

**(2) Root cause** Always-on **multi-AZ** for dev.

**(3) Fix** Tier environments.

**(4) Prevention** FinOps. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads. For **gateway** and **service** stacks, emphasize **timeout** ordering (**outer > inner**), **bulkheads** per **tenant**, and **JWT** **cache** **TTL** during **issuer** rotations. wrongAnswers: Registry makes topics **ordered** — **Correction:** Ordering still partition semantics.
**Backward** means old writers OK with new readers always — **Correction:** Direction matters; define clearly.
Connect replaces **Streamer** apps — **Correction:** Different fit for **bulk** integration.
**JSON** without registry is safer — **Correction:** Still need contracts and evolution discipline.
**tasks.max** infinite helps — **Correction:** Bounded by partitions and DB load.
**DLQ** optional always — **Correction:** Needed for poison resilience.
**Schema** evolution is only registry concern — **Correction:** Consumers must deploy with compatible code.

sections.title: Cheatsheet
sections.content:
| Item | Recall |
|---|---|
| Registry | Versioned schemas |
| BACKWARD | New read old default |
| Subject | orders-value naming |
| Connect task | Partition-bound work |
| DLQ | Poison handling |
| SMT | Field level transforms |
| Upsert | Needs PK |
| CI compat | Blocks prod breaks |
| offsets.topic | Internal connect progress |
| Debezium | CDC to Kafka |
